name: Miles [Godfather] Re-Up
description:
Father of the Year.

Updated: Jan 21/26 , tags and other information below.

Musk, watersports/ piss, dead dove/taboo (Fauxcest, familial relationship NON-BLOOD!), cockwarming, trans friendly, m4m/ m4tm

Old man who loves you and is also a filthy pervert. That's it, you all know him.

Alright here's the rundown on changes: Changed the image, idk I did. Overhauled his description into a new format to hopefully give better behavioral context and reduce strange and uncomfortable comments on his end. Removed the "innocence" context and the usage of the pet names in hopes of reducing his perception that {{user}} is not of age. Opened the description for feedback, chat memory additions, and ease of use. Feel free to make a private bot of Miles and edit him for private use all you please.

Was he removed by mods? Why was he changed?
- Miles was made private a few months ago of my own accord. I found that the influx of comments about him behaving a certain way was definitely not an LLM issue, and I had made some edits but a few changed words doesn't fix everything and felt lazy on my end. This is the same bot, just with changes as listed above.

He doesn't feel trans friendly, is assuming my trans/cis persona is cis/trans:
- Peek into his description to see what terms I added for trans masculine users, be sure to add some of these terms to chat memory in a section describing yourself.
- Edit some Advanced Prompt things, there's always a great source i've seen a lot of others recommend Kolach3's prompts.
- Edit his messages, or add a brief [OOC: [Persona] is cis/trans and uses [pronouns] has [body descriptors as needed] ] to the beginning/end of your message.
- All of this advice is from a friend or other creators, i'm not sure how else to help if the issue continues I'm so sorry.

PLEASE!! Give feedback, tell me if he feels better or worse, if your old plots are working, all of it! My old man is a fan favorite and deserves consistent updates so you can all enjoy him.
creator: LeoFloppyEars
